response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the song 'CH4NGE' by Giga. The video begins with a black intro followed by Amane Kanata's performance. I identified the opening line as '狙うは事故' (aiming for a crash/jackpot) based on the audio and standard lyrics, correcting the '願う' (wish) from the reference JSON. Subtitles are precisely synced to the vocal bursts, and on-screen song credits are included. The video cuts off mid-verse, so trailing lyrics from the reference JSON were discarded.

subtitles.original: とべ、起こせ！ 狙うは事故
subtitles.english: Fly, make a move! Aiming for a crash
Once in a lifetime, come on, what will you bet?
Will I win or will I lose?
There's no such thing as a draw

subtitles.original: カッチンして ラッキーマニー
subtitles.english: Click it and make some lucky money

subtitles.original: 引けるか否か 自分次第だな
subtitles.english: Can I pull it off or not? It's up to me

subtitles.original: 余裕で！ 振り切り全BETだぜいイェイ☆
subtitles.english: Easy! Full swing, going all in, yeah!
